extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from a 4-rider breakaway that held off a disorganized peloton depleted by clothing changes and crashes in horrific weather.
tactical_patterns: Clothing changes at 70km to go fractured peloton cohesion, Gaviria crashed immediately after his change and abandoned chase.
Ineos positioned 4 riders in top 10 after Vlasov/Vine withdrawals, building numerical GC advantage without attacking.
Peloton let 4-rider break win by 30+ seconds despite having sprinters, suggesting domestique losses from weather chaos prevented organized chase.

rider_signals.VINE Jay: negative: Lost 10 minutes and top-10 GC position simply staying with main group, exposing poor wet weather resilience.
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: Crashed immediately after clothing change and abandoned chase, poor timing judgment on equipment swap.
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: neutral: Won intermediate sprint but couldn't organize sprint finale despite teammate presence in break.
rider_signals.GEE Derek: positive: Second stage podium at Giro, launched decisive attack inside 1500m showing breakaway finishing strength.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Abandoned with illness only hours into stage, questionable start decision cost GC position.
